added: // use the recommended way of reading YAML files
deleted: throw grunt.util.error('Unable to delete "' + filepath + '" file (' + e.message + ').', e);
// True if the file path exists.

cve_description: The package grunt before 1.3.0 are vulnerable to Arbitrary Code Execution due to the default usage of the function load() instead of its secure replacement safeLoad() of the package js-yaml inside grunt.file.readYAML.
